channel.title: Twitch Emote on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Twitch Emote on RaihnForge

item.title: Back2Warcraft Twitch Emote — B2WRip
item.description:
B2WRip is a Twitch emote made for the Back2Warcraft channel, the long-running shoutcasting home for Warcraft III esports. The mark is built to be readable at Twitch’s tiny emote sizes (28px, 56px, 112px) while still carrying the channel’s visual personality, so it lands in chat the moment a play goes south.

Designed as part of an ongoing graphics package for B2W, alongside a paired animated shoutout sequence that triggers on stream when the emote gets spammed during a moment of dramatic loss. The animation extends the emote into a short on-broadcast beat that closes the loop between chat and the show itself.

item.title: Back2Warcraft Twitch Emote — B2WBoat
item.description:
B2WBoat is a Twitch emote built for the Back2Warcraft channel. Like the rest of the B2W emote family, it has to do its job at 28, 56, and 112 pixel sizes, so the silhouette and color blocking carry most of the work. The artwork sits in the channel’s running visual language alongside the other shoutcaster-specific emotes used during Warcraft III broadcasts.

Part of an ongoing graphics package for Back2Warcraft that mixes overlay coverlay assets, emote families, and animated shoutouts so the channel reads as one cohesive show across chat, overlay, and stream.
